text:
Detection: No security vendors flagged this file as malicious
File: skill.zip  Size  17.30 KB
Last analysis: 2026-02-17 04:34 UTC
Code insights: Type: OpenClaw Skill
Name: sudoku
Version: 2.2.0

The OpenClaw Sudoku skill bundle is benign. All code and documentation align with the stated purpose of fetching, rendering, and revealing Sudoku puzzles. File operations are confined to the skill's designated workspace directories (`sudoku/puzzles/` and `sudoku/renders/`), and network requests are exclusively directed to `sudokuonline.io` for puzzle data. There is no evidence of data exfiltration, malicious execution, persistence mechanisms, or prompt injection attempts against the AI agent. Minor parsing complexities and `glob` usage with user input are not indicative of malicious intent or significant vulnerabilities.
